ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-02-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Malone for Donald Jones (Petitioner).

Mr. Malone explained that distribution will be divided into eleven root shares and then further divided, that the Decedent had no Spouse, no issue, no Parents or Aunts or Uncles, but that he had eleven Cousins. Mr. Malone also explained that Silvia Ferrara was a first Cousin who had two Sons, that her Husband had one Son (Robert Tannler), that he knows this and that this was verified from interviews with Family members, and that Mr. Tannler was born seven years before the marriage. In addition, Mr. Malone stated that Thomas Nelson Tower pre-deceased, that he dealt with this issue in a supplemental declaration but that the proposed order is not corrected, that Randolph gets 1/11th and that there are no objections from anyone. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Heirship (subject to receipt and review of a revised order).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Continued To Sep-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (666 Post Street, #1403, San Francisco, Ca 94109)
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Franklin Niemi.

The sale was confirmed at $415,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $397,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
